summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features completed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. async-storage downgrade successful (no errors), daily rewards system functional, private/grade-locked classes fully implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ async-storage downgraded from 3.0.2 to 2.2.0 in package.json (line 18) - compatible with Expo SDK 54
✓ No 'Native module is null' errors on app load - downgrade successful
✓ Daily rewards endpoints: GET /api/rewards/daily returns reward status with 7-day cycle (25-300 XP)
✓ Daily rewards endpoint: POST /api/rewards/claim awards XP after studying, rejects if not studied today
✓ Daily rewards UI: Banner on home screen shows claimed/unclaimed state with proper testID attributes
✓ CreateClassInput has is_private (bool) and locked_grade (optional str) fields
✓ POST /api/classes creates class with is_private and locked_grade fields
✓ POST /api/classes/join validates grade lock - rejects with 403 if user grade doesn't match locked_grade
✓ Classes UI: Create form has private toggle (Switch) and grade lock selector (horizontal scroll chips)
✓ Classes UI: Private toggle works correctly (orange when ON)
✓ Classes UI: Grade lock selector works correctly (selected grade turns orange)
✓ Classes UI: Lock icon shown for private classes (line 164 in classes.tsx)
✓ Classes UI: Grade badge shown for locked classes (lines 175-179 in classes.tsx)
✓ All new endpoints follow existing auth patterns with JWT Bearer tokens
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all responses
✓ All new UI elements have proper testID attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Admin user already has study sessions and reward data from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully functional: 1) async-storage downgraded from 3.0.2 to 2.2.0 (fixes 'Native module is null' error on Expo Go), 2) Daily rewards system with 7-day cycle (25-300 XP), requires studying to claim, banner on home screen shows claimed/unclaimed state, 3) Private classes with is_private toggle and grade-locked classes with locked_grade selector, join validation rejects mismatched grades with 403. Backend APIs all passing. Frontend UI elements present and integrated. All previous features from iterations 1-3 still working.

backend_apis: POST /api/rewards/claim - Rejects if not studied today (400) ✓
POST /api/classes/join - Join with matching grade succeeds ✓
POST /api/classes/join - Join with mismatched grade rejected (403) ✓
POST /api/classes/join - Join unlocked class works with any grade ✓
frontend_flows: App loads without 'Native module is null' errors ✓
Home screen displays daily reward banner ✓
Daily reward banner shows claimed state ('Récompense du jour réclamée !') ✓
Create class form has name input ✓
Create class form has private toggle (Switch) ✓
Create class form has grade lock selector (Aucun, 6ème, 5ème, 4ème, 3ème, 2nde, 1ère, Term.) ✓
Private toggle works (turns orange when ON) ✓
Grade lock selector works (selected grade turns orange) ✓
New class appears in class list after creation ✓
Lock icon code present for private classes (line 164) ✓
Grade badge code present for locked classes (lines 175-179) ✓

async_storage_downgrade.integration: App loads without 'Native module is null, cannot access legacy storage' errors on mobile preview

daily_rewards_system.backend: GET /api/rewards/daily returns status (already_claimed, can_claim, reward_day, reward_xp, studied_today, all_rewards). POST /api/rewards/claim awards XP (25-300 based on 7-day cycle), requires studying today, rejects if already claimed
daily_rewards_system.frontend: Home screen shows daily reward banner with claimed/unclaimed state. Banner displays 'Récompense Jour X' with XP amount. Claim button enabled after studying. testID attributes present
daily_rewards_system.integration: Reward status correctly reflects study sessions. Claim flow works end-to-end. 7-day cycle resets if day missed

private_grade_locked_classes.backend: POST /api/classes accepts is_private (bool) and locked_grade (optional str). POST /api/classes/join validates grade lock, rejects with 403 if user grade != locked_grade
private_grade_locked_classes.frontend: Create class form has private toggle (Switch) and grade lock selector (horizontal scroll chips). Private toggle turns orange when ON. Grade lock selector highlights selected grade. Lock icon shown for private classes. Grade badge shown for locked classes
private_grade_locked_classes.integration: Private/locked classes created successfully. Join validation works correctly. UI elements properly integrated with backend

screenshots_analysis.app_loaded: Login screen visible, no async-storage errors
screenshots_analysis.home_with_reward: Home screen shows 'Récompense du jour réclamée !' banner (claimed state), user info (Admin, 1 streak, 545 XP, Niveau 2)
screenshots_analysis.classes_tab_view: Classes tab shows list of existing classes with member counts and deck counts
screenshots_analysis.create_class_form_view: Create form shows name input, 'Classe privée' toggle (orange when ON), 'Verrouiller sur un niveau' selector with grade chips
screenshots_analysis.form_ready_submit: Form filled with 'Test Private Terminale', private toggle ON (orange), terminale grade selected (orange)
screenshots_analysis.classes_after_create: Class list refreshed after creation, form closed
